proposal.title: Dynamic Cron Priority Engine
proposal.description: Current cron scheduling is static (fixed intervals per task). Implement priority-based cron: (1) gradient-weighted scheduling (tasks with higher gradient magnitude get more frequent execution), (2) saturation-aware scheduling (when exploration mode active, reduce reinforcement cron frequency, increase exploration cron frequency), (3) cross-agent cron coordination (prevent overlapping heavy tasks across agents — if Randi2 is running a deep code analysis, reduce Zero's deployment check frequency to avoid resource contention), (4) cost-aware scheduling (prefer free model executions during high-usage periods, premium models during low-usage). Target: reduce wasted cron cycles by 30% and improve gradient collection density.

notes: Generated via TPG-GRAO-AutoEvolution cron saturation trigger. Targets cron inefficiency — static scheduling doesn't adapt to gradient dynamics or saturation state.
